column2: The changes become visible after a PowerPoint restart.
This discards all changes since the last save and cannot be undone. Proceed?
This permanently deletes the slide reference, and with it the ability to update all thumbnails in the presentation.
This permanently deletes the slide reference, and with it the ability to update the thumbnail.
This appears to be your first start of QuickEdit. Open the guide (PDF)?
This overwrites existing data validations and cannot be undone. Proceed?
This BKT version is modified for {}. The download URL has been overwritten. Open the download page {} now?
This BKT version has been modified for {}.
This function copies the sheets of several workbooks into one workbook. Please select the workbooks to consolidate:
This function copies the cells of several worksheets into one sheet. Please select the worksheets to consolidate:
This function copies each sheet into a separate file. Please select the worksheets to save:
This function is only available for rectangles.
Apply this style to the current selection.{}\n\nWith the SHIFT key: create a new shape in the chosen format.
With many libraries this operation can take several minutes and cannot be canceled. Continue anyway?

An en dash (Halbgeviertstrich) as Office sometimes inserts automatically. Used as a range or distance dash.
Insert a true cross multiplication sign.
Insert a true minus sign (not a hyphen).
Insert a true dot multiplication sign.
Insert a bold curved cross (matching the check mark).
Insert a bold symmetrical cross (similar to a multiplication sign).
Insert a curved cross (matching the check mark).
Insert a symmetrical cross (similar to a multiplication sign).
Insert a true fraction slash (similar to a slash).
Insert the entered formula into the active cell.

Insert a %sx%s table of standard shapes (%s columns, %s rows)
Inserts the symbol into the current text or a new shape.
Inserts a numbering shape for each selected shape. Numbering and styling according to the selection. Selected shapes are numbered according to the selection order.
Change the fill level of a Harvey ball to %s
Angled connectors unfortunately do not work with custom shape points.
Returns the cell content from the start up to the entered text. If the text is not found, the cell content remains unchanged.
Here you can apply a regular expression to all selected cells. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.
Here you can search for a regular expression in all selected cells and count the number of matches. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.
Here you can search and replace a regular expression in all selected cells. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.

Here you can apply a formula to all selected cells. If the cell content should not be at the beginning, you can use the placeholders $cell and $cellvalue. By default the resulting value is inserted (if the formula is not faulty). If your input begins with '=', a formula is created. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.
